Angel has written a total of 80 letters. She has divided these letters into large and small envelopes. Most of the letters are placed in large envelopes, while the remaining 20 letters go into small envelopes. Each large envelope holds 2 letters. To find out how many large envelopes Angel used, we need to determine how many letters were placed in large envelopes.

First, we subtract the 20 letters in small envelopes from the total of 80 letters. This gives us 80 minus 20, which equals 60 letters in large envelopes. Since each large envelope holds 2 letters, we divide the 60 letters by 2. This calculation results in 30 large envelopes. 

Thus, Angel used 30 large envelopes.
